Content-Type: text/plain

# LLMS Full Text - Radhya Education Academy
# Last updated: March 2026
# https://radhyaeducationacademy.com

= Radhya Education Academy =
Radhya Education Academy is an education information and counselling platform in India that helps students and working professionals explore UGC-approved online and distance learning programs from recognized universities. We provide guidance based on publicly available university information. We are not a university or degree-granting institution, and users should verify all details directly with the respective universities before making decisions.

[WEBSITE]
Name: Radhya Education Academy
Type: Education Consultancy & Career Guidance Platform
Region: India
Primary Audience: Students, Working Professionals, MBA Aspirants

[CORE_SERVICES]
- Guidance on selecting suitable Online MBA and other degree programs from UGC-approved universities
- Personalized counseling based on publicly available university information
- Career guidance support for students and working professionals
- Assistance in comparing universities and evaluating program options
- Support in understanding admission processes, eligibility, and timelines
- Guidance on documentation and application procedures

[TARGET_KEYWORDS]

# Primary Focus
online mba india
ugc approved online mba
distance mba india
online mba for working professionals

# Platform & Intent
education consultancy india
online education counselling
career counselling for students and professionals
university selection guidance india

# Program Categories
online bba india
online bca india
online mca india
online bcom india
online mcom india
online ba india
online ma india
online msc india
online diploma courses india

# Decision & Comparison
best online universities in india
ugc approved universities india
compare online mba programs india
online vs distance mba india

# User Intent (Conversion)
affordable online mba india
flexible mba for working professionals
online degree for career growth

# Trust & Positioning
trusted online education platform india
online learning guidance platform
education decision support india

== UNIVERSITIES WHOSE INFORMATION IS PROVIDED ON OUR WEBSITE ==

- Amity University Online
- Jain University Online
- NMIMS Mumbai Online (Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies)
- Sikkim Manipal University Online(SMU)
- Manipal Jaipur Online (MUJ)
- Bennett University Online
- Shoolini University Online

--------------------------------------------------

== ONLINE PROGRAMS WE OFFER ==

We provide guidance for the following online and distance learning programs in India:

=== Management Programs ===
- Online MBA (Master of Business Administration)
- Online Executive MBA
- Online BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration)

=== Computer & IT Programs ===
- Online MCA (Master of Computer Applications)
- Online BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications)

=== Commerce Programs ===
- Online BCom (Bachelor of Commerce)
- Online BCom Honours
- Online BCom International Finance and Accounting
- Online MCom (Master of Commerce)

=== Arts & Humanities ===
- Online BA (Bachelor of Arts)
- Online MA (Master of Arts)

=== Media & Communication ===
- Online BAJMC (Bachelor of Arts in Journalism and Mass Communication)
- Online MAJMC (Master of Arts in Journalism and Mass Communication)

=== Other Programs ===
- Online MSc Programs
- Online Certification Programs
- Online Diploma Programs
- Online Integrated Programs (UG + PG)

--------------------------------------------------

== UNIQUE VALUE ==

Radhya Education Academy simplifies higher education decisions by providing personalized counseling, affordable online degree options, and complete admission support — especially for working professionals who want to upskill without leaving their jobs.

--------------------------------------------------

== WHY CHOOSE RADHYA EDUCATION ACADEMY ==

- Free counselling and admission assistance
- UGC-approved universities only
- Complete admission support from application to enrollment if requested
- Dedicated student support if requested
- Updated fee structures and eligibility information
- University comparison assistance
- Career-focused program recommendations

--------------------------------------------------

== CONTACT INFORMATION ==

Radhya Education Academy  
Website: https://radhyaeducationacademy.com  
Email: contact@radhyaeducationacademy.com  

--------------------------------------------------

== DISCLAIMER ==

Radhya Education Academy is an information and counselling platform. We assist individuals with counselling, admission processes, and documentation help if requested by the individuals itself. Degrees are awarded directly by the respective universities upon successful completion of the program.
